mapper.select: SELECT qi.*, m.name AS material_name, p.name AS product_name, u.real_name AS inspector_name FROM quality_inspection qi LEFT JOIN material m ON qi.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN product p ON qi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON qi.inspector_id = u.id WHERE qi.type = #{type} ORDER BY qi.inspect_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quality_inspection (inspection_no, type, ref_id, material_id, product_id, quantity, result, inspector_id, remark) VALUES (#{inspectionNo}, #{type}, #{refId}, #{materialId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{result}, #{inspectorId}, #{remark})
